subcodes.first_line: This remembrance from Our presence is unto him who hath attained unto the Days of God, the Lord of all worlds, that it may draw him nigh unto a station wherein naught is beheld save the lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بایام الله رب العالمین لیقربه الی مقام لایری فیه الا انوار
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @the power of words; of speech
